decisions.name: Check_if_Collection_of_Days_is_not_Null
decisions.label: Check if Collection of Days is not Null

decisions.name: Check_if_Old_Availability_Schedule_is_present
decisions.label: Check if Old Availability Schedule is present

formulas.name: MonScreenValidation
formulas.expression: IF( AND( OR( CONTAINS({!Availability_Monday}, "Available"), CONTAINS({!Availability_Monday}, "ND"), CONTAINS({!Availability_Monday}, "Unavailable") ), {!Unavailable_Monday} = true ), false, true )

validationRule.errorMessage: You cannot select Unavailable when any of the above slot is selected.

fields.name: Thankyoumessagefirst
fields.fieldText: Thank you for providing your availability. We have received it and will integrate it into your schedule within the next few minutes.

fields.name: Thankyoumessage
fields.fieldText: Thank you for providing your updated availability. We have received it and will integrate it into your schedule within the next few minutes.

fields.name: error_text
fields.fieldText: You can only create availability for a maximum of 30 days in advance. Please click "back" to adjust your dates and try again.
